fields.name: Name
fields.description: Source designation based on J2000 position: SPT-CL JHHMM+DDMM

fields.name: RA
fields.description: Right Ascension in J2000 decimal degrees

fields.name: Best_Significance
fields.description: The highest detection significance, xi, in the filtered map

fields.name: Best_Core_Radius
fields.description: Core radius theta_c corresponding to the detection

fields.name: Int_SZ_Compton
fields.description: The integrated Sunyaev-Zel'dovich comptonization Y_SZ within a 0.75 arcminute aperture

fields.name: Int_SZ_Compton_Error
fields.description: Uncertainty in the integrated SZ comptonization Y_SZ

fields.name: Redshift_Note
fields.description: Flag 'S' indicates spectroscopic redshift from SPT observations

fields.name: Mass_500c
fields.description: Mass enclosed within a radius at which the average density is 500 times the critical density
